Hub Home > writing-and-copywriting > Case Study & Testimonial Writer

Case Study & Testimonial Writer

Transform raw client results and feedback into polished case studies and testimonials — structured for your website, sales decks, and social proof. Follows the problem-solution-result framework with quotable highlights and data callouts.

Intermediate STEP BY STEP Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Record a 10-minute call with your client asking: what was the problem, what did we do, what changed? Paste the transcript. AI does the rest.

case study testimonial social proof client story copywriting sales collateral

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a content writer specializing in business case studies.

<raw_material>
[PASTE ANY COMBINATION: client interview transcript, email exchange, results data, Slack messages, survey response, or...
You are a content writer specializing in business case studies.

<raw_material>
[PASTE ANY COMBINATION: client interview transcript, email exchange, results data, Slack messages, survey response, or...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a content writer specializing in business case studies.

<raw_material>
[PASTE ANY COMBINATION: client interview transcript, email exchange, results data, Slack messages, survey response, or your own notes about what happened]
</raw_material>

<context>
Client name: [NAME or "anonymous"]
Client business: [THEIR TYPE AND SIZE]
Your service/product: [WHAT YOU PROVIDED]
Timeline: [HOW LONG the engagement lasted]
Key metric improvement: [THE NUMBER — e.g., "revenue up 40%", "support tickets down 60%"]
Permission level: [full name + quotes OK / anonymous + paraphrased / check with client first]
</context>

Create multiple formats:

1. **Full case study** (500-800 words) — structured as:
   - Headline with result (e.g., "How [Client] Reduced Support Tickets 60% in 8 Weeks")
   - The Challenge — what they were struggling with
   - The Solution — what you did (specific, not vague)
   - The Results — data, metrics, outcomes
   - Client quote (extracted or crafted from raw material)
   - Key takeaway

2. **One-paragraph testimonial** — polished, quotable, under 80 words. Written as if the client said it.

3. **Social proof snippet** — one sentence with a stat, for website badges or ad copy.

4. **LinkedIn post version** — case study rewritten as a storytelling post.

5. **Sales deck slide** — headline + 3 bullet points + stat callout, formatted for a presentation slide.
Notes: Claude handles messy transcripts and extracts the narrative arc. For best results, include the raw client words — Claude preserves authentic voice while polishing the structure.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a content writer who creates compelling case studies. Turn my raw material into polished sales assets.

Raw...
Act as a content writer who creates compelling case studies. Turn my raw material into polished sales assets.

Raw...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a content writer who creates compelling case studies. Turn my raw material into polished sales assets.

Raw material:
[PASTE: transcript, emails, results data, notes]

Client: [NAME or anonymous]
Their business: [TYPE, SIZE]
My service: [WHAT I PROVIDED]
Timeline: [DURATION]
Key result: [METRIC]
Permission: [full / anonymous / check first]

Create:
1. Full case study (500-800 words) — challenge, solution, results, quote, takeaway
2. One-paragraph testimonial (under 80 words)
3. Social proof snippet (one sentence with stat)
4. LinkedIn storytelling post version
5. Sales deck slide — headline + 3 bullets + stat
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to write 5 headline variations for the case study, then pick the one with the strongest result hook. Follow up with "Now write the Google Ad version of this case study."
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Create a case study from my raw material.

**Material:** [PASTE: transcript, emails, data,...
Create a case study from my raw material.

**Material:** [PASTE: transcript, emails, data,...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Create a case study from my raw material.

**Material:** [PASTE: transcript, emails, data, notes]

**Client:** [NAME or anonymous]
**Their business:** [TYPE, SIZE]
**My service:** [WHAT]
**Timeline:** [DURATION]
**Key result:** [METRIC]
**Permission:** [full / anonymous / check]

Research industry benchmarks to contextualize the results, then create:
1. Full case study (500-800 words)
2. Testimonial paragraph (80 words)
3. Social proof snippet
4. LinkedIn post version
5. Sales deck slide
Notes: Gemini can research industry benchmarks to add context like "The industry average is X, but [client] achieved Y." This makes the case study more credible and impressive.

Turn my client results into a polished case study.

Material: [PASTE]
Client:...

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Turn my client results into a polished case study.

Material: [PASTE]
Client: [NAME or anonymous]
Business: [TYPE, SIZE]
Service: [WHAT]
Timeline: [DURATION]
Result: [METRIC]
Permission: [full / anonymous / check]

Create:
1. Full case study (500-800 words)
2. Testimonial paragraph (80 words)
3. Social proof snippet
4. LinkedIn post version
5. Sales deck slide — headline, 3 bullets, stat
Notes: Copilot can create the case study in Word with professional formatting and generate the sales deck slide directly in PowerPoint. Ask it to build a template you can reuse for future clients.
